2026-05-31T09:41:53.3455608Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.3455897Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.3456160Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.3456409Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.3456815Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.3457161Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.3457376Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.5029720Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6613853Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6614210Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6614683Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6614985Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6615307Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6615653Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6616005Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6616424Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6616821Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6617179Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6617446Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6617667Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6618178Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6618654Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6618860Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6619350Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6619926Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6620415Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6620615Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6621191Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6621864Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6622071Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T09:41:53.6622418Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
